violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Close boxes/bags of frozen eggs and cinnamon rolls in walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Store wiping cloth in sanitizer solution between uses.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Storage room has unfinished construction.
Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. Recommend wearing food service gloves while preparing ready to eat pasta salad.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood filters need cleaning.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Storage room walls/ceiling not finished.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
